modules.module_title: Harvesting, Processing of Honey & Value-Added Products

questions.question: Scientific study aur management of honeybees ko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Honeybees ke scientific rearing aur management ko Apiculture kehte hain.

questions.question: Bee colony me main egg-layer (anda dene wali) kaun hoti hai?
questions.explanation: Rani makhi (Queen) colony me akeli reproductive female hoti hai jo anday deti hai.

questions.question: Drone bees ka bee colony me main function kya hota hai?

options.C: Queen bee ke sath mating karna (reproduction)

questions.explanation: Drones male bees hote hain jinka main purpose rani makhi ke sath mate karna hota hai.

questions.question: Worker bees kis category me aati hain colony me?

options.A: Sterile Females (kam na kar paane wali females)

questions.explanation: Worker bees sterile females hoti hain jo reproduction nahi kar sakti hain par saara kaam karti hain.

questions.question: Ek normal bee colony me Rani makhi (Queen) ki sankhya kitni hoti hai?
questions.explanation: Ek healthy madhumakhi ke chhate (colony) me hamesha sirf ek hi Rani makhi hoti hai.

questions.question: Royal Jelly kya hoti hai?

options.B: Special feed jo worker bees dwara Queen larve ko khilane ke liye secrete hota hai

questions.explanation: Royal jelly worker bees ki glands se nikalta hai jo rani makhi aur naye larve ka special food hota hai.

questions.question: Rani makhi apne pure lifetime me lagbhag kitne anday de sakti hai daily peak season me?
questions.explanation: Rani makhi spring/peak season me daily 1500-2000 tak anday de sakti hai jo uske body weight se zyada hai.

questions.question: Queen bee worker bees ko control karne ke liye kaun sa chemical/pheromone secrete karti hai?
questions.explanation: Rani makhi apne mandibular glands se Queen Substance pheromone chhodti hai jo colony ko united rakhta hai.

questions.question: Madhumakhi ke chhate (comb) ki cells kis shape ki hoti hain?
questions.explanation: Madhumakhi ka chhata hexagonal cells se bana hota hai jo maximum space utilization aur strength deta hai.

questions.question: Madhumakhi ke chhate me Wax (Moom) kaha se aata hai?

options.B: Worker bees ke abdomen glands se secrete hota hai
options.C: Trees ki bark se nikalta hai

questions.explanation: Worker bees ki abdominal wax glands se moom (wax) secrete hota hai jisse chata banaya jata hai.

questions.question: Madhumakhiyo me information share karne ke liye kis type ka dance kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Karl von Frisch ne discover kiya tha ki makhinya waggle/round dance se food source ki direction aur distance batati hain.

questions.question: Beekeeping me 'Swarming' ka kya matlab hota hai?

options.B: Old Queen ka aadhi colony ke sath naye ghar ki khoj me nikal jana

questions.explanation: Natural reproduction ke liye jab chhate me population badh jati hai, to old queen aadhi population lekar naya chhata banane chali jati hai.

questions.question: Bee colony me 'Absconding' kya hota hai?

options.B: Kharab climate ya dushman ke darr se poori colony ka chhata chhod kar bhag jana

questions.explanation: Absconding me poori colony (Queen + workers) khana na hone ya attack hone par chhata permanently chhod deti hai.

questions.question: Worker bee ki average age summer season me lagbhag kitni hoti hai?

options.B: 6 weeks (approx 1.5 months) kam ki thakavat se

questions.explanation: Active season me heavy work ke karan worker bee lagbhag 6 weeks tak hi jee paati hai.

questions.question: Duniya me honeybee ki sabse badi size wali wild species kaun si hai?
questions.explanation: Apis dorsata (Rock bee) sabse badi hoti hai jo bade chhate banati hai par ise domesticate karna mushkil hai.

questions.question: Apis mellifera kis country/region ki native honeybee breed hai?
questions.explanation: Apis mellifera European ya Italian bee hai jise commercial beekeeping ke liye sabse best mana jata hai.

questions.question: Indian domestic honeybee ka scientific name kya hai?
questions.explanation: Apis cerana indica Indian honeybee hai jo calm nature ki hoti hai aur palne me aasan hai.

questions.question: Sabse choti size wali domestic honeybee species kaun si hai?
questions.explanation: Apis florea sabse choti size ki bee hai jo chote chhate banati hai aur kafi kam honey deti hai.

questions.question: Bee life cycle ke four stages ka correct sequence kya hai?
questions.explanation: Honeybee ka development complete metamorphosis se hota hai: Egg -> Larva -> Pupa -> Adult.

questions.question: Worker bee banne ke liye egg se adult tak kitne din lagte hain lagbhag?
questions.explanation: Worker bee ke development me 21 din lagte hain, Rani me 16 din aur Drone me 24 din lagte hain.

questions.question: Drone bee (male) unfertilized egg (bina fertilization ke ande) se paida hota hai, is process ko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Bina male fertilization ke egg se offspring banne ki process ko Parthenogenesis kehte hain.

questions.question: Rani makhi (Queen bee) ki life span lagbhag kitni hoti hai?
questions.explanation: Rani makhi 2 se 5 saal tak jee sakti hai aur lagatar anday de sakti hai.

questions.question: Kaun si honeybee species palne ke liye sabse dangerous ya aggressive mani jati hai?
questions.explanation: Apis dorsata kafi aggressive hoti hai aur distrub karne par poore swarms me insano/animals par attack karti hai.

questions.question: Apis florea (Little bee) ka honey yield (salana doodh/honey utpadan) average kitna hota hai?
questions.explanation: Apis florea bohot choti hoti hai aur salana sirf 500g se 1kg honey hi produce kar paati hai.

questions.question: Italian bee (Apis mellifera) ko India me introduce karne ke piche main reason kya tha?

options.A: High honey production aur low swarming behavior

questions.explanation: Italian bee local bees ke mukable zyada honey deti hai aur chhata chhod kar nahi bhagti (low absconding).

questions.question: Worker bees ke pass anday na dene par bhi sting (dank) hota hai kya?

options.A: Haan, worker bees ke pass defense ke liye sharp sting hota hai
options.B: Nahi, sirf drones ke pass hota hai
options.C: Sirf rani makhi ke pass dank hota hai insano ke liye
options.D: Kisi bhi makhi ke pass dank nahi hota

questions.explanation: Worker bees ke pass modified ovipositor (sting) hota hai jo poison sac se juda hota hai.

questions.question: Worker bee jab kisi mammal (jaise human) ko sting karti hai, to uske baad kya hota hai?

options.B: Uska dank (sting) toot jata hai aur wo mar jati hai
options.C: Wo queen bee ban jati hai
options.D: Us par koi asar nahi hota

questions.explanation: Human skin elastic hoti hai jisme sting fass jata hai aur khinchne par bee ka digestive tract damage ho jata hai aur wo mar jati hai.

questions.question: Drones (male bees) me sting (dank) hota hai kya?

options.A: Nahi, drones ke pass sting nahi hota (stingless)
options.B: Haan, sabse bada dank unka hi hota hai
options.D: Agar workers allow karein tabhi hota hai

questions.explanation: Male bees (drones) ke pass sting nahi hota, isliye unhe haath se pakda ja sakta hai bina darr ke.

questions.question: Bee venom me main active chemical component kaun sa hota hai jo swelling paida karta hai?
questions.explanation: Melittin bee venom ka major toxin hai jo pain aur inflammation trigger karta hai.

questions.question: Stingless bees (Melipona) kya bilkul honey nahi banati?

options.A: Banati hain, par kafi kam quantity me aur unka honey medicinal hota hai
options.B: Haan, wo sirf waste material khati hain
options.C: Wo wax ka honey banati hain
options.D: Duniya ka sabse zyada honey wahi banati hain

questions.explanation: Stingless bees chote size ki hoti hain jo tree trunks me rehti hain, unka honey highly prized aur medicinal hota hai.

questions.question: Worker bees ki age-wise duty me first duty (shuruati 3 din) kya hoti hai?

options.B: Chhate (cells) ki safai karna aur larvae ko warm rakhna
options.C: Rani makhi ko mating ke liye le jana

questions.explanation: Young worker bees shuruat me hive duties karti hain jaise cleaning aur feeding, aakhiri stage me foraging (bahar jana) karti hain.

questions.question: Larvae state me queen, worker aur drone ke feed me kya common difference hota hai?

options.A: Queen larve ko lagatar Royal Jelly khilayi jati hai, baqi ko 3 din ke baad honey/pollen mix
options.B: Queen ko sirf pollen diya jata hai
options.C: Worker ko kuch nahi khilaya jata
options.D: Drones ko sirf water milta hai

questions.explanation: Royal jelly continuous khilane se hi normal female larva queen bee me develop hoti hai.

questions.question: Queen bee mating flight (nuptial flight) ke waqt drone ke sath kaha mate karti hai?
questions.explanation: Nuptial flight hawa me unchai par hoti hai jaha rani makhi kai drones ke sath mate karti hai aur sperm store kar leti hai.

questions.question: Mating ke baad drone male bee ka kya hota hai?

options.A: Wo wapas aakar worker ban jata hai
options.B: Uski death ho jati hai (endophallus damage se)
options.C: Wo new hive ka leader banta hai
options.D: Wo sleep mode me chala jata hai

questions.explanation: Mating ke turant baad drone ka genital organ break ho jata hai aur uski death ho jati hai.

questions.question: Madhumakhi kis family/order ka insect hai?
questions.explanation: Honeybees Hymenoptera order aur Apidae family se belong karti hain.

questions.question: Modern apiculture me use hone wale box ko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Rev. L.L. Langstroth ne movable frame hive design kiya tha jo aaj standard Langstroth box ke naam se use hota hai.

questions.question: Madhumakhi box ke andar frames ke beech ke khali space ko kya kehte hain jo bees ko aane-jaane ke liye zaroori hai?
questions.explanation: Bee space (3/8 inch) wo corridor hai jise bees na to block karti hain aur na hi waha chhata banati hain. Iska invention hi modern beekeeping ka base hai.

questions.question: Madhumakhiyon ko shant karne aur check-up ke waqt dank se bachne ke liye kis equipment ka use kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Smoker se dhuan karne par makhinya sochti hain ki aag lagi hai aur wo honey consume karke shant ho jati hain aur dank nahi maarti.

questions.question: Apiary inspect karte waqt face aur neck ko protect karne ke liye pehne jane wale helmet/net ko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Bee veil net ka bana mask hota hai jo face ko stings se protect karta hai par inspection me rukawat nahi banta.

questions.question: Hive boxes me frames par naya mom (wax foundation) chipkane ke liye base sheet ko kya kehte hain?

options.A: Comb Foundation Sheet (mom ki bani ready sheet)

questions.explanation: Comb Foundation Sheet par hexagonal markings pehle se hoti hain, jisse makhinyo ko chata banane me kam mehnat lagti hai.

questions.question: Bee hive box ke sabse bottom part (floor) ko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Bottom Board base frame hota hai jis par poora hive box rest karta hai aur entrance slot hota hai.

questions.question: Madhumakhi box ke kis chamber me rani makhi anday deti hai (lower chamber)?
questions.explanation: Lower part me Brood Chamber hota hai jaha eggs, larvae aur food reserves hote hain.

questions.question: Honey jama karne wale upper chamber ko kya kehte hain jisse honey harvest kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Honey Super me bees sirf clean honey store karti hain aur isme brood (bachhe) nahi hote.

questions.question: Rani makhi ko Honey Super me jaane aur waha anday dene se rokne ke liye kis device ka use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Queen Excluder grill ke gaps itne hote hain ki workers nikal sakein par bada size hone ke karan Rani makhi nahi nikal sakti. Isse honey super me anday nahi aate.

questions.question: Honey harvest karte waqt chhate se bees ko clean karne wale brush ko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Bee brush kafi soft hota hai jisse makhinyon ko bina hurt kiye frame se hataya jata hai.

questions.question: Frames ko handle karne aur chhate ko box se lift karne wale small metal tool ko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Hive Tool propolis (glue) se chipke frames ko pry open karne aur scrap karne ke kaam aata hai.

questions.question: Hive boxes ko zameen se upar rakhne ke liye kis stand ka use hota hai aur usme kya safety hoti hai?

options.A: Ant Well (Stand ki legs ko pani/grease ke cup me rakhna ants se bachav ke liye)

questions.explanation: Ant well/cup box ko ants (cheetiya) se bachata hai, jo colony ko poora destroy kar sakti hain.

questions.question: Apiary (madhumakhi farm) ke liye sahi location select karte waqt kis cheez ki availability sabse zaroori hai?

options.A: Clean water aur 1-2 km ke radius me pollen/nectar wale trees/crops (Bee Flora)

questions.explanation: Bees max 2-3 km tak udti hain, isliye flora aur clean drinking water farm ke pass hona zaroori hai.

questions.question: Apiary me box entrance ka face kis direction me rakhna best mana jata hai?

options.B: East aur South-East (Suraj ki pehli kiran chhate par pade)

questions.explanation: East ya South-East face karne se subah jaldi sun exposure hota hai aur bees jaldi active hokar foraging par nikal jati hain.

questions.question: Madhumakhiyon ke chhate ko clean aur air-tight rakhne ke liye trees se jo sticky resin collect karti hain, use kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Propolis ek antiseptic resinous glue hai jisse bees chhate ke cracks ko band karti hain aur sanitize rakhti hain.

questions.question: Bee Flora (madhumakhi charagah) se kya matlab hai?

options.B: Pollen aur Nectar dene wale plants, flowers aur crops

questions.explanation: Mustard, sunflower, Eucalyptus, neem, litchi, etc. bee flora hain jo honey production ke liye main sources hain.

questions.question: Nectar se bees kya banati hain aur Pollen ka kya use hota hai?

options.A: Nectar se honey banta hai, Pollen protein feed ki tarah use hota hai brood ke liye

questions.explanation: Nectar carbohydrate (sugar) source hai jo honey banta hai, aur pollen protein/mineral source hai jo larve ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: India me honey production ke liye sabse important agricultural crop flora kaun si hai winter me?
questions.explanation: Sarson (mustard) flowers winter season me honeybees ke liye nectar aur pollen ka sabse bada source hain, iska honey light yellow aur crystalize hone wala hota hai.

questions.question: Dry season (dearth period) me jab flowers nahi hote, tab bees ko artificial feed ke roop me kya diya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Dearth period me starvation se bachane ke liye boxes me sugar syrup (chini ka ghol) feeders me diya jata hai.

questions.question: Sugar syrup feeding ke sath protein deficiency door karne ke liye kya diya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Pollen na hone par soy flour, yeast aur sugar se bani pollen patty/supplement khilayi jati hai.

questions.question: Sardiyon (Winter season) me hives ko thand se bachane ke liye kya management kiya jata hai?

options.A: Boxes ko jute bags se wrap karna aur entrance gate ko chota karna
options.C: Bees ko free range me rakhna

questions.explanation: Winter packing me jute bags (gunny bags) use hote hain taaki temperature maintain rahe aur draft air control ho.

questions.question: Garmiyon (Summer season) me apiary ko extreme heat se bachane ke liye kya karte hain?

options.A: Green net / shade banana aur boxes par wet jute bags rakhna

questions.explanation: Garmiyon me dhoop se bachane ke liye chaya (shade) dena aur wet bags se temperature cooling dena zaroori hai.

questions.question: Monsoon (Rainy season) me beekeeping box me moisture aur fungus se bachne ke liye kya management zaroori hai?

options.A: Boxes ko tilt karna taaki pani andar na ruke aur stands ko clean rakhna
options.B: Shed bilkul pack karna bina ventilation ke
options.C: Bees ko anday dene se rokna

questions.explanation: Monsoon me moisture se boxes rot ho sakte hain aur wax moth ka infection badhta hai, isliye proper drainage aur stands ko dry rakhna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Beekeeping me 'Migration' (prasthan) ka kya matlab hota hai?

options.A: Hive boxes ko flowers aur crops ke seasonal availability ke hisab se doosri jagah shift karna

questions.explanation: Migration se salana honey production kafi badhta hai (jaise sarson ke time Punjab/Haryana, litchi ke time Bihar/Uttarakhand migrate karna).

questions.question: Migration ke liye hives ko kis samay pack aur transport kiya jata hai?

options.A: Raat ke samay (Night time) jab sabhi foraging bees wapas box me aa jayein
options.D: Kabhi bhi bina time constraint ke

questions.explanation: Raat ko bees flight nahi karti aur sabhi box me hoti hain, isliye gate closed karke transport karna safe hota hai.

questions.question: Migration box packing me gate block karne ke alawa air ventilation ke liye kya lagaya jata hai?

options.A: Wire mesh (Jaali) screen entrance aur top par

questions.explanation: Boxes ko closed rakhne par suffocating se bees mar sakti hain, isliye ventilation jaali (wire mesh) lagana zaroori hai.

questions.question: Apiary me new colony start karne ke liye swarm ko trap karne ko kya kehte hain?

options.A: Swarm Catching (Hive box me bait lagakar attract karna)

questions.explanation: Swarm catching me natural swarm ko pakad kar new box me set kiya jata hai lemongrass oil ya pheromone lures ki help se.

questions.question: Lemongrass oil ka beekeeping me kya use hai?

options.B: Bees ko attract karna swarm catching ke liye (is smell ko bees pasand karti hain)

questions.explanation: Lemongrass oil ki smell worker bees ke Nasanov pheromone jaisi hoti hai jo bees ko attract karti hai.

questions.question: Bee box me excess moisture se kaun sa pathological decay hota hai?
questions.explanation: Chalkbrood fungal infection hai jo cold aur damp (geele) conditions me larvae ko dry aur chalky (white) bana deta hai.

questions.question: Dearth period me colony population control karne ke liye kya karna pad sakta hai?

options.A: Dono weak colonies ko combine (unite) karna

questions.explanation: Do weak colonies ko unite karke ek strong colony banayi jati hai taaki dearth period me survival easy ho (newspaper method use hota hai).

questions.question: Madhumakhiyon par attack karne wala sabse common external parasite mite kaun sa hai?
questions.explanation: Varroa destructor mite bees aur larvae ka hemolymph (blood) suck karta hai aur deformed wing virus failata hai.

questions.question: Varroa mite infestation se bachne ke liye organic acid treatment me kya use hota hai?

options.A: Formic Acid ya Oxalic Acid treatment

questions.explanation: Formic acid vapors aur Oxalic acid trickling Varroa mites ko kill karte hain bina bees ko harm kiye.

questions.question: Madhumakhiyon ke chhate ke moom (wax) ko khane aur damage karne wale insect ko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Wax Moth ke larvae comb ke wax ko khate hain aur silk tunnels banate hain jo pure chhate ko barbaad kar deta hai.

questions.question: Wax moth infestation kis season me sabse zyada active hota hai?

options.B: Monsoon aur Post-monsoon (High humidity and warm weather)

questions.explanation: Rainy season me humidity aur moderate temperature wax moth ke reproductive cycle ke liye perfect hota hai.

questions.question: Madhumakhiyon ko pakad kar khane wale yellow/black predatory insect ko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Wasps (Bhirad) apiary ke entrance par bees ko catch karti hain aur unhe feed karti hain. Inhe control karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Wasp attack ko control karne ka kya effective field method hai?

options.A: Wasp Traps (Sweet bait water bottles) aur wasp nests ko destroy karna

questions.explanation: Wasp traps ko apiary ke aas-pass hang kiya jata hai taaki bhirad usme fass jayein.

questions.question: American Foulbrood (AFB) aur European Foulbrood (EFB) kis type ki destructive bimariyan hain larvae ki?
questions.explanation: Foulbrood dangerous bacterial disease hai jo larvae ko dead aur badbudaar (foul odor) paste me convert karti hai.

questions.question: American Foulbrood (AFB) infection confirm hone par control ka kya standard protocol hai?

options.B: Box aur comb ko aag laga kar burn aur deep bury karna (Highly contagious disease)

questions.explanation: AFB ke spores 40+ years tak active reh sakte hain aur chemotherapy se thik nahi hote, isliye infected frames ko jalana hi padta hai.

questions.question: Madhumakhiyon ke respiratory system ko affect karne wali 'Acarine disease' (Isle of Wight) kis wajah se hoti hai?
questions.explanation: Tracheal mites bees ke saans lene wali windpipes (trachea) me rehte hain aur unhe block karte hain.

questions.question: Nosema disease jo adult bees me diarrhea (pechis) paida karti hai, kis microorganism se hoti hai?
questions.explanation: Nosema bees ke digestive ventriculus me infect karti hai jisse dysentery/diarrhea hota hai aur spots hive body par dikhte hain.

questions.question: Hive boxes me ants (cheetiyon) ke heavy attack ko prevent karne ke liye stand ki legs ke cup me kya mix kiya jata hai?

options.A: Water mixed with burnt engine oil or crude oil

questions.explanation: Ant cups me oil dalne se cheetiya stands par nahi chadh paati.

questions.question: Moths aur beetles se empty/stored frames ko bachane ke liye unhe kis gas/chemical se store room me treat karte hain?

options.A: Acetic acid vapors ya Sulphur fumigation

questions.explanation: Stored frames ko dry room me acetic acid vapor ya sulphur fumes se treat kiya jata hai taaki wax moth ke eggs destroy ho sakein.

questions.question: Green Woodpecker (chidiya) apiary me kya damage karti hai?

options.B: Wooden boxes me hole karke bees ko consume karti hai

questions.explanation: Woodpecker birds box ki wood me pecking karke hole karti hain aur bees ko eat karti hain.

questions.question: Ccd ka beekeeping me kya full form hai jisme bees achanak gayab ho jati hain?
questions.explanation: Colony Collapse Disorder (CCD) me achanak majority worker bees hive chhod kar gayab ho jati hain, jiska exact reason pesticide/stress maana jata hai.

questions.question: Pesticides (jaise Neonicotinoids) ka crops par spray hone se beekeeping par kya asar padta hai?

options.B: Bees disoriented hokar rasta bhool jati hain aur mar jati hain

questions.explanation: Chemical pesticides bees ke nervous system ko damage karte hain jisse memory loss aur heavy mortality hoti hai.

questions.question: Bee flora crops par insecticide spray hone ke kitne din tak bees ko farm se door ya box band rakhna chahiye?

options.A: At least 2-3 days (ya safe organic spray use ho)
options.D: Spray ke turant baad kholna chahiye

questions.explanation: Chemical toxicity kam hone tak mesh jaali lagakar bees ko confinement me rakhna chahiye aur sugar syrup khilana chahiye.

questions.question: Sacbrood disease kis type ka infection hai jo larvae ko water-filled sac (thaili) me convert karta hai?
questions.explanation: Sacbrood ek viral disease hai jo larvae ki skin shedding rokti hai aur wo sac jaise dead structure me badal jata hai.

questions.question: Chhate ke inspections ke waqt hives me excessive smoke (dhuan) karne se kya harm ho sakta hai?

options.A: Bees abscond (bhaag) sakti hain aur honey ka flavor kharab ho sakta hai
options.B: Bees aggressive ho kar double kaatengi
options.C: Wax foundation sheet dissolve ho jayegi

questions.explanation: Smoker ka limit me use karna chahiye, excessive smoke bees ko suffocate karke absconding trigger kar deta hai.

questions.question: Apiary inspection ke dauran bees agar aggressive hone lagein to kya immediate action lena chahiye?

options.A: Shed wapas band karke smoker se light smoke dena aur door hat jana
options.B: Pani ka spray karna tezi se

questions.explanation: Aggression ke time frame ko dhyan se wapas box me rakh kar lid lagana chahiye aur retreat karna chahiye.

questions.question: Hives ke aaspas weed clearing (ghans/jhadiyo ki safai) kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Cheeti aur snakes se bachav ke liye aur air flow badhane ke liye
options.C: Honey quality improve karne ke liye
options.D: Stand color match karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Jhadiyan hone se cheeti aur doosre predator insects aasaani se box me ghus sakte hain.

questions.question: Frames se honey nikalne ke liye kis machine ka use kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Honey Extractor centrifugal force se comb ko bina damage kiye liquid honey bahar nikal leta hai, jisse frames wapas use ho jate hain.

questions.question: Honey extraction ke pehle comb ke cells par lami wax layer ko hatane ko kya kehte hain?

options.A: Uncapping (Uncapping knife se mom ki layer kaatna)

questions.explanation: Bees honey pakne ke baad cell ko wax se seal (cap) karti hain. Extraction se pehle heated uncapping knife se ye cap kaati jati hai.

questions.question: Natural, ripe honey me water (moisture) percentage lagbhag kitna hona chahiye standard norms ke hisab se?
questions.explanation: Honey me moisture content 20% se kam hona chahiye. Agar moisture 21% or more hoga to yeasts grow karenge aur honey ferment (sour) ho jayega.

questions.question: Honey me payi jane wali main sugar kaun si do sugars ka mixture hoti hai?
questions.explanation: Honey me lagbhag 38% Fructose aur 31% Glucose hota hai, jo ise ek quick energy source banate hain.

questions.question: Honey storage me winter me 'Granulation' (dane banna ya jamna) kya hai?

options.B: Natural process (Glucose separate hokar crystals banata hai)

questions.explanation: Thand me pure honey ka jamna ya crystallize hona ek natural chemical behavior hai (specially mustard honey bohot jaldi jamta hai).

questions.question: Jame hue honey ko fir se liquid karne ke liye kya kiya jata hai?

options.A: Direct gas flame par heat karna
options.B: Double boiler method (Garam pani ke andar container rakh kar warm karna, maximum 45°C)

questions.explanation: Direct heat karne se honey ke enzymes aur nutrients destroy ho jate hain aur hydroxymethylfurfural (HMF) badh jata hai jo zehrila ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Honey me HMF (Hydroxymethylfurfural) level check karne ka kya reason hai?

options.A: Honey ki freshness aur excess heating check karne ke liye
options.C: Sugar density check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Excess heat karne ya purana honey hone par HMF chemical badh jata hai. Standard limits isko 40-80 mg/kg tak restrict karti hain.

questions.question: Beekeeping business me honey ke alawa kaun sa high-value byproduct milta hai jiska cosmetics me use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Bee wax, royal jelly, propolis aur bee venom sabhi high-value products hain jo extra profit dete hain.

questions.question: Apitherapy kya hoti hai?

options.B: Bee products (jaise honey, venom, royal jelly) se human health diseases ka treatment karna

questions.explanation: Apitherapy alternative medicine branch hai jisme bee venom aur bee products se joint pain, arthritis aur skin problems treat kiye jate hain.

questions.question: Unripe Honey (kachha honey) kya hota hai?

options.A: Jise makhinyo ne chhate me cap (seal) nahi kiya aur moisture content high (22%+) hai

questions.explanation: Uncapped cells me moisture zyada hota hai. Agar isko nikalenge to ye jaldi fermented hokar sour (khatta) ho jayega.

questions.question: Honey processing me commercial scale par micro-impurities filter karne aur shelf-life badhane ke liye kya kiya jata hai?

options.B: Settling, heating (approx 60°C to dissolve crystals) aur micro-filtration

questions.explanation: Processing me honey ko settle karke heating ki jati hai taaki crystallization khatam ho aur fine filter se wax/pollen clear ho jaye.

questions.question: Honey me milawat (adulteration) ke liye sabse common chemical syrup kaun sa use hota hai aajkal?

options.A: C3/C4 sugars (jaise Corn syrup, Rice syrup, Invert sugar)

questions.explanation: High fructose corn syrup (HFCS) aur rice syrup (C3/C4 sugars) detect karna normal tests se kafi mushkil hota hai.

questions.question: Honey purity check karne ke liye govt-approved standard test agency kaun si hai India me?
questions.explanation: Agmark grade standards honey ki physical aur chemical quality parameters (moisture, HMF, sucrose, etc.) ko certify karte hain.

questions.question: Madhumakhiyon ke environment me crop pollination (paragan) par kya contribution hai?

options.A: Ye cross-pollination karke crop yield (paidawar) 20-30% tak badha deti hain
options.B: Ye crop ko nuksan pahuchati hain
options.C: Ye plants ko eat karti hain

questions.explanation: Pollination apiculture ka sabse bada indirect benefit hai. Mustard, sunflower aur apple orchards me yield bohot badhti hai.

questions.question: Bee keeping business me salana profit badhane ke liye kis scheme ke under Govt subsidies provide karti hai?

options.A: Sweet Revolution / National Beekeeping & Honey Mission (NBHM)

questions.explanation: NBHM sweet revolution scheme ke under self-help groups aur farmers ko bee boxes, extractors aur trainings par 40-50% subsidy milti hai.
